name: Canyon Lake Activity Center
description: Canyon Lake Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rapid City, SD. There are 9 concrete courts. 6 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
hours: Mon – Fri | 8 AM – 4 PM (605) 721-8710 Thank you to all the volunteers that help the Center every day! Privacy Policy Terms and Conditions Follow Us On Social Media Facebook Youtube Instagram Powered by Ultimate Auction Pro

name: Hart Ranch Resort
description: Hart Ranch Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rapid City, SD. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Quarry Park
description: Quarry Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rapid City, SD. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include wheelchair accessibility and food. The courts are free.

name: Rapid City YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Rapid City YMCA in Rapid City, SD! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Rushmore Shadows Resort
description: Rushmore Shadows Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rapid City, SD. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Tennis Center of the Black Hills
description: Pickleball courts can be reserved and paid online with the app CourtReserve.com.   There are also fitness equipment.  Table tennis is also available while waiting
open_play_schedule: Courts are available 24-7 daily.  Please call and leave message for court availability.   Leagues and lessons are also available.
fees: Fee required — Currently court fees are $12 per hour per person.  Or $20 for 2 hours per person

name: Wall Public Park
description: Wall Public Park is a place to play pickleball in Wall, SD. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Wilson Park
description: Come play pickleball at Wilson Park in Rapid City, SD! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
